title: AstroPrecise — Birth Details for Your Personalised PDF

meta.title: AstroPrecise Birth Details
meta.description: Submit birth details after purchase to receive your personalised natal PDF.

properties.description: Hello {{hidden:full_name}}! Your birth data is used only to generate your PDF and is deleted after delivery. AstroPrecise never stores birth data on its website. Entertainment purposes only — not medical, financial, or legal advice.
Your personalised PDF will be emailed within 24 hours.

fields.title: What is your full name (as you want it printed on your reading)?
What is your email address? (Must match your purchase email.)
What is your date of birth?
What is your time of birth? (e.g. 14:30 — or type "unknown")
Where were you born? (City and country)
Confirm your Lemon Squeezy order number (pre-filled if you came from your receipt)
I understand this reading is for entertainment only and is not medical, financial, or legal advice.
